sections.title: Attempting to climb up the war tent prior to 19 April 2018

lines.speaker: Captain Kilian
lines.text: Halt! Lord Shayzien does not wish to be disturbed.

lines.speaker: General Kilian
lines.text: I'm just leafing through some designs, waiting for the others to decide what's needed. It's taking them a while, but there's sure to be some engineering involved in whatever they decide.

lines.speaker: General Kilian
lines.text: You do realise this is a military installation, right? Tourists are generally not welcome.
